canvas.note: Pure white — future iterations should add chroma 0.005–0.008 at hue 218 for warmth.

headline.purpose: Page titles, modal headers, view anchors.

title.purpose: Card titles, panel headers, subsection labels.

body.purpose: Table data, form values, descriptions, notes. The default reading level.

label.purpose: Stat card category identifiers, data section markers only. Not for general headings.

shadows.name: card-rest
shadows.purpose: Default state for all Card components. Gives surface presence without lifting it off the page.

shadows.name: card-hover
shadows.purpose: Card pointer-hover and interactive focus. A small lift to signal responsiveness.

shadows.name: dialog
shadows.purpose: Modals and full dialogs. Maximum shadow level in the system.

motion.name: ease-out-fast
motion.purpose: State transitions — hover, focus, active. Snappy with natural deceleration.

motion.name: ease-out-standard
motion.purpose: Layout transitions — sidebar expand/collapse, panel open/close.

breakpoints.name: md
breakpoints.note: Sidebar switches to fixed desktop layout.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Main CTA. Used for form submission and single-primary-action-per-screen.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.65 0.17 218); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 9px 16px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: oklch(0.59 0.17 218); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px oklch(0.65 0.17 218 / 0.28); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.65 0.17 218 / 0.4); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: oklch(0.55 0.17 218); }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary actions and cancel paths. Transparent at rest.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: transparent; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); padding: 9px 16px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.04 218); } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.65 0.17 218 / 0.4); } .ds-btn-ghost:active { background: oklch(0.90 0.05 218); }

components.name: Destructive Button
components.description: Permanent, irreversible actions. Must be preceded by a confirmation dialog.
components.css: .ds-btn-destructive { display: inline-flex; align-items: center; justify-content: center; gap: 8px; background: oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325); color: oklch(1 0 0); padding: 9px 16px; height: 36px; border-radius: 8px; border: none; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, BlinkMacSystemFont, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; line-height: 1.4; cursor: pointer; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-btn-destructive:hover { background: oklch(0.52 0.245 27.325); box-shadow: 0 2px 8px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.28); } .ds-btn-destructive:focus-visible { outline: none; box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.577 0.245 27.325 / 0.4); }

components.name: Card
components.description: Primary container surface for grouped content. Always carries card-rest shadow.
components.html:
Member Profile

Last updated 2 hours ago

Card content goes here.
components.css: .ds-card { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 10px; padding: 24px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.07), 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); transition: box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-card:hover { box-shadow: 0 4px 12px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.09), 0 2px 4px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.06); } .ds-card-header { margin-bottom: 16px; } .ds-card-title { font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); font-size: 16px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); margin: 0 0 4px; } .ds-card-desc { font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); margin: 0; } .ds-card-content { font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); line-height: 1.5; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Standard form field. Labels always above. 36px height.
components.css: .ds-field { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 6px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); } .ds-label { font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-input { height: 36px; padding: 0 12px; border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 8px; background: oklch(1 0 0); color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-size: 14px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); transition: border-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), box-shadow 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); outline: none; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-input:hover { border-color: oklch(0.65 0.17 218 / 0.6); } .ds-input:focus { border-color: oklch(0.65 0.17 218); box-shadow: 0 0 0 3px oklch(0.65 0.17 218 / 0.2); }

components.name: Sidebar Navigation
components.description: Primary navigation. Default, hover, and active states. 16rem wide on desktop.
components.html: MembersGuestsEvents
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 2px; padding: 4px; } .ds-nav-item { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 8px; padding: 6px 8px; border-radius: 8px; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); text-decoration: none; transition: background 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1), color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-nav-item:hover { background: oklch(0.95 0.04 218); } .ds-nav-item--active { background: oklch(0.95 0.04 218); color: oklch(0.65 0.17 218); } .ds-nav-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; flex-shrink: 0; }

components.name: Stat Card
components.description: Dashboard metric display. Label/value/delta structure is fixed — do not repurpose as a general card.
components.html:
Total Members

1,248

+12 this month
components.css: .ds-stat { background: oklch(1 0 0); border: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); border-radius: 10px; padding: 20px; display: flex; flex-direction: column; gap: 12px; box-shadow: 0 1px 3px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.07), 0 1px 2px oklch(0 0 0 / 0.05); font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); } .ds-stat-head { display: flex; align-items: center; justify-content: space-between; } .ds-stat-label { font-size: 11px; font-weight: 600; text-transform: uppercase; letter-spacing: 0.15em; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-stat-icon { width: 16px; height: 16px; color: oklch(0.556 0 0 / 0.4); } .ds-stat-value { font-size: 30px; font-weight: 600; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); font-variant-numeric: tabular-nums; margin: 0; line-height: 1.1; } .ds-stat-delta { font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.70 0.11 200); margin: 0; }

components.name: Table with Identifier Link
components.description: The mandatory link treatment on primary identifier columns (name, date, title) across all tables in the app.
components.html:
NameGroupStatus
Maria SantosYoung AdultsActive
Jose ReyesSinglesActive
components.css: .ds-table { width: 100%; border-collapse: collapse; font-family: var(--font-geist-sans, -apple-system, sans-serif); font-size: 14px; } .ds-th { padding: 8px 12px; text-align: left; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.556 0 0); border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); } .ds-tr { border-bottom: 1px solid oklch(0.922 0 0); transition: background 100ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-tr:hover { background: oklch(0.97 0 0); } .ds-td { padding: 10px 12px; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); } .ds-td--muted { color: oklch(0.556 0 0); } .ds-table-link { font-weight: 500; color: oklch(0.145 0 0); text-decoration: underline; text-decoration-style: dashed; text-underline-offset: 2px; text-decoration-color: oklch(0.145 0 0 / 0.5); transition: text-decoration-color 150ms cubic-bezier(0.16, 1, 0.3, 1); } .ds-table-link:hover { text-decoration-color: oklch(0.145 0 0); }

narrative.overview:
Every record in this system is a person at a specific point in their spiritual journey. The interface should be worthy of that fact — not by being ornamental or sentimental, but by being precise, calm, and completely trustworthy. Staff should be able to move through their work without thinking about the UI. The system gets out of the way.

The aesthetic is structured restraint. Density is moderate: enough information to be productive, not so much that the task becomes crowded. Whitespace is functional. Hierarchy is established through scale and weight — never through decoration. The palette is dominated by neutrals, with one deliberate voice: Reliably Blue, a mid-intensity institutional blue that appears only where there is something actionable or navigable. Still Water, a muted teal, marks positive movement in data; it signals quietly, without demanding attention.

What this system explicitly rejects: hero-metric layouts with giant numbers and gradient accents, glassmorphism, identical icon-card grids, gradient text, and every convention that reads as AI-assembled SaaS UI. The interface should not announce that it exists. It should make the work faster, and reflect the care that staff bring to managing a real community.
keyCharacteristics: Moderate-density layout with clear spatial hierarchy
Single accent color (Reliably Blue) reserved strictly for actionable elements
Flat-to-subtly-lifted elevation — cards have presence without floating
Geist Sans: geometric with humanist details — precise without coldness
Label style (11px uppercase tracked) as a navigational convention, not a general treatment

rules.name: The One Voice Rule
rules.body: Reliably Blue appears on ≤15% of any given screen. When everything is blue, nothing is. Active nav item, primary CTA, and focus ring: three uses, no more.

rules.name: The Tint Rule
rules.body: The current neutral tokens carry zero chroma — pure oklch(L 0 0) grays. Against a blue accent they read cold. Future iterations should add a chroma of 0.005–0.008 at hue 218 to Canvas, Paper, Surface Muted, and Hairline.

rules.name: The Label Overhead Rule
rules.body: The 11px uppercase tracked label style is a navigational signal, not a styling option. Restrict it to stat card labels and explicit data category markers.

rules.name: The Contrast Floor Rule
rules.body: No text rendered below WCAG AA contrast ratio, regardless of size. Verify muted text on muted backgrounds explicitly.

rules.name: The Flat-At-Rest Rule
rules.body: Sidebar, page background, and table rows are always flat. Cards lift slightly. Dialogs lift further. Nothing exceeds dialog-level shadow.

dos: Do use Reliably Blue exclusively for actionable and navigational elements.

Do apply the mandatory table link style on every primary identifier column: font-medium underline decoration-dashed underline-offset-2 decoration-foreground/50 hover:decoration-foreground transition-colors.
Do restrict the 11px uppercase tracked label style to stat card labels and data category identifiers.
Do pair all destructive actions with a confirmation dialog before executing.
Do apply card-rest shadow on all Card components. Apply card-hover on pointer hover.
Do verify WCAG AA contrast on all text/background pairings.
Do cap body text at 65–70ch in long-form contexts.
Do use Geist Mono for IDs, reference numbers, and confirmation tokens.
Do place form labels above their fields — never inside, never floating.
donts: Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text with a gradient). Prohibited.
Don't use glassmorphism: no blur-backed translucent surfaces anywhere.
Don't build hero-metric layouts: large number, small label, gradient accent.
Don't use a colored left-border stripe (> 1px) as a card variant or alert pattern.
Don't rely on color alone to convey meaning.
Don't use shadows stronger than dialog-level.
Don't skip the confirmation dialog for delete actions.
Don't use hover:underline or Button asChild links in table identifier columns.
Don't use the label style (11px uppercase tracked) outside stat cards and category markers.
